word: G1127 - γρηγορεύω - grēgoreúō - gray-gor-yoo'-o - Be vigilant

sections.paragraph:
- Original: γρηγορεύω

- Transliteration: Gregoreuo

- Phonetic: gray-gor-yoo'-o

- Definition:

1. to watch

2. metaph. give strict attention to, be cautious, active

a. to take heed lest through remission and indolence some destructive calamity suddenly overtake one

- Origin: from G1453

- TDNT entry: 07:38,2

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G1453; to keep awake that is watch (literally or figuratively): - be vigilant wake (be) watch (-ful).
